content.en:
"What's the secret?"

Ye Tian asked excitedly.

In the end, the final catastrophe had always been the most worrying thing in his heart, and until now, he had no way to get through it, and he was not even sure.

Even he wasn't sure, let alone the Terrans and his own relatives.

Now, he finally got a little hope from these ultimate ancient demons, and he was naturally very excited.

The Ancient Demon continued, "Our plane and time line is about to collapse, and the final calamity is the calamity that is going to collapse. Even if it was a space-time level ultimate ancient demon, there was actually no way to stop the final catastrophe, so he could only escape by himself. And the way to escape is to go to another time and space line!"

"Other planes?"

Ye Tian was shocked, "You mean to say that there are other space-time lines outside of ours?"

"Yes!" the Ancient Demon nodded, "There is an initial point in time before all space-time lines, and from this point in time, space-time lines gradually evolve one after another, and each space-time line gradually gives birth to a complete space-time and countless worlds, but each space-time line will eventually perish." And our plane-time line is now going to perdition, but some plane-time lines are still very safe. If a space-time line gives birth to a lot of space-time level ultimate ancient demons, it will continue to extend the timeline of the space-time line, so that the final final tribulation will be delayed tenfold, a hundred times, or even forever. In fact, when it comes to the space-time level Ultimate Ancient Demon, it can constantly jump one time-space line after another, and it will never affect such a powerhouse!"

"Other planes!"

Ye Tian finally knew how to avoid the final catastrophe, but without the strength of the space-time level ultimate ancient demon, how could he leave?

"Do you have a way to leave?"

Ye Tian asked.

"There is a slight chance, but in fact, there is no certainty!" "According to our inference, when the final catastrophe is finally reached, this side of the space-time line will collapse, and at that time, there will be a space-time rift in this side's space-time line, if you can lock the coordinates of other space-time lines and use the large array, there is a certain hope of escaping into other space-time lines, but the success rate is less than one percent~.!"

It's less than a 1 percent success rate, but that's the only way they can think of it at the moment.

As for wanting to become a space-time level ultimate ancient demon, they didn't even have a one-in-a-billion certainty.

How difficult it is to become a space-time level ultimate ancient demon, and how amazing the original Dovi Ancient Demon was, it still failed.

Maybe they don't besiege and kill the Dovi Ancient Demon, but the Dovi Ancient Demon has a glimmer of hope to break through to the space-time level ultimate Ancient Demon.

But the ultimate ancient demons are very selfish among themselves, they can't all surrender to the hands of the Dovi Ancient Demons, and put their hopes on the Dovi Ancient Demons, they all want to take hope into their own hands.

That's what led to the big war at the beginning!

Afterwards.

Ye Tian learned more information from these ultimate ancient demons, but it was of little value, after all, they only had this method, and the others were just fictional assumptions.

After these Ultimate Ancient Demons left, Ye Tian was pondering how to break the game.

"Waiting for the final catastrophe to come, and then looking for the slightest opportunity to escape from this time and space line, this method is not reliable. Moreover, even if I can escape, what about other races, my relatives, even if they are included in the inner world, it is estimated that it will be difficult to take them out of the time and space line, and the slightest fluctuation will shatter their bodies and make them fall. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Therefore, the best way is for him to break through to the ultimate extreme supreme realm of the space-time level, so that he can break away from this space-time line and truly be at ease.

"Anyway, there is still a long time before the final final realm, so I'd better really perfect the seventh form, the final form, first!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

In the days that followed, he continued to refine his final form with the help of the Ultimate Thing, the Leaf of the Last Thing.

Before you know it, a long time has passed.

Through the ages.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian successfully perfected the seventh form, the final form.

"The final form, it's done!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

At this moment, he urged the final form, and his whole body was filled with a gray aura, which was the embodiment of the final aura integrated into his body.

At this moment, his strength far surpassed the norm, and he could kill the top ultimate ancient demon with a single blow.

At this moment, he is truly invincible.

Although he can maintain his Ultimate Form forever, this form also consumes a lot of energy, and he cannot continue to fight forever unless he can quickly recover his energy.

These years.

In addition to studying the final form, his cultivation has also improved, reaching the late stage of the Extreme Dao Ultimate Extreme Venerable, the Extreme Dao Ultimate Extreme Venerable Body has also reached the top level, and the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Dao Ultimate Rules have also comprehended a lot, far surpassing the past.

Now, his strength has surpassed that of the original Dovi Ancient Demons, even if dozens of Dovi Ancient Demons join forces to deal with him, they are not his opponents.

He couldn't find an opponent anymore, and he couldn't test his true strength.

......

Fragments of time and space.

Ye Tian stood here, urging the final form to see if he could break through this space-time line with his own strength. []

Boom !!! Warriors!

Ye Tian's terrifying aura shook the space-time shattered ruins, and also attracted the attention of a group of ultimate ancient demons, who entered the space-time shattered ruins one by one and sensed Ye Tian's breath.

"That's the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable, he can always maintain the seventh form of the final form!"

"He has perfected the seventh form, the final form, and there are no sequelae at all!"

"What the Dovi Ancient Demon can't do, the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable has done it, he's too demonic!"

At this moment, these Ultimate Ancient Demons had no idea of fighting against Ye Tian at all, even if their strength broke through again, all of them were comparable to the existence of the Duowei Ancient Demons, and it was estimated that they would not be able to defeat Ye Tian when they joined forces.

"What is the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable going to do?"

They were very puzzled, there was no enemy here, what was the Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable doing with full firepower?

"He should be trying to break the space-time line, but the strength of the non-space-level ultimate ancient demon is impossible to break the space-time line. At the beginning, a large number of Ultimate Ancient Demon Kills, at the time of the final tribulation, shattered the space-time line, but only shattered the space-time line, and did not break through the passage between the space-time line and other space-time lines. No matter how the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable attacks, it can only make the space-time ruins even more shattered, and there is no other meaning!"

These Ultimate Ancient Demons said.
